faq_answer_texts: No. The customer-facing experience is designed around WhatsApp, where customers already communicate.
No. The Taco Heat experience uses demonstration data and is not connected to a live restaurant database.

Yes. A pilot can be designed around your menu, modifiers,
                ordering method, kitchen roles, delivery process and reports.

The current product direction supports driver assignment and
                delivery statuses. It does not advertise unsupported live GPS
                tracking.

We select one high-value workflow, configure the restaurant
                rules, test it safely and review the operational results before
                expanding.
